title: Raw UGC Joy Reaction
description: A raw selfie video of a young Italian girl reacting with explosive, genuine happiness and happy tears.

prompt.concept: Raw selfie video of an Italian girl in her early 20s losing her mind with happiness. She just got news — like an acceptance email, a refund, a yes — and she's gasping and squealing into her front camera. Real joy, real shake, real UGC. The kind of clip you'd send to your group chat.

character.hair: dark brown wavy hair, real day-old waves, frizzy at the crown, one strand falling over her face
character.skin: olive skin with realistic texture, naturally flushed cheeks from the excitement (not blush), slight shine on nose, no foundation, just chapstick and faded mascara
character.eyes: warm brown, getting watery from the joy, squinting from genuine smile
character.expression: explosive real happiness — open-mouth gasping smile, eye crinkles, the kind of joy that makes you tear up

wardrobe.top: soft cream knit sweater, oversized, slightly pilled, slipping off one shoulder showing a bra strap, no logo
wardrobe.nails: coral pink polish, slightly grown out

setting.location: her bedroom or living room, sitting on the floor or bed
details: unmade bed or messy couch behind her
laptop open nearby, slightly out of frame
warm lamp or window light, mid-afternoon
background is a real apartment, not staged
slight motion blur in background from her bouncing

camera.shot: selfie close-up, face and upper chest, hands occasionally entering frame
camera.angle: phone held in one hand, slightly low angle, lots of natural shake from her excitement
camera.lens_feel: iPhone front camera, 1x, slight selfie distortion
camera.movement: actively shaky from her bouncing/squealing, not a smooth handheld

lighting.key: warm natural daylight from window or lamp

image_quality.color: ungraded, warm tones from natural lighting
image_quality.imperfections: occasional slight focus shift from her movement

prompt.micro_idle_before_reaction: 0.0-0.3s lips already parted, eyes already wide, like she's been staring at a screen for 2 seconds processing

action_timeline.beat: Lips parted, eyes huge and locked off-camera (looking at her laptop), like she just read something. Pre-reaction tension.
BURST: open-mouth gasp into a squealing laugh, head shakes side to side in disbelief, hands fly up into frame and shake/clap rapidly, body bounces
Peak joy: laughing-crying mix, voice cracks on 'oh my god' or 'olamaz!', tears welling, one hand presses to chest the other to mouth
Slowly settling but still glowing — wipes one happy tear, exhales a laugh, looks back at camera with overwhelmed huge smile, mouth still half open

gesture_rules.movement_style: Full-body, bouncy, uncontrolled. Real joy isn't smooth.
realism_ticks: real Duchenne smile with deep eye crinkles

no_text_no_graphics.note: Pure raw clip. No overlays, no UI, no text, no logos, no watermarks.
